# Use Case Diagram - Albuera Emergency Management System

## Mermaid Diagram Definition

Copy this code to https://mermaid.live to generate the image:

```mermaid
%% Use Case Diagram for Albuera Emergency Management System
%% Generated by Albuera EMS
%% https://mermaid.live

graph TD
    %% Define actors
    Resident[Resident (Citizen)]
    Respondent[Emergency Respondent]
    Admin[System Administrator]
    
    %% Define use cases
    UC1[Report Emergency]
    UC2[Track Report Status]
    UC3[View Emergency Alerts]
    UC4[Respond to Emergency]
    UC5[Assign Tasks to Respondents]
    UC6[Send SMS Notifications]
    UC7[Verify Resident Accounts]
    UC8[Manage User Accounts]
    UC9[Post Emergency News]
    UC10[View Analytics Dashboard]
    
    %% Define system boundary
    subgraph "Albuera EMS System"
        direction TB
        UC1
        UC2
        UC3
        UC4
        UC5
        UC6
        UC7
        UC8
        UC9
        UC10
    end
    
    %% Define relationships
    Resident -->|triggers| UC1
    Resident -->|tracks| UC2
    Resident -->|views| UC3
    Resident -->|accesses| UC10
    
    Respondent -->|monitors| UC2
    Respondent -->|performs| UC4
    Respondent -->|accesses| UC10
    
    Admin -->|monitors| UC1
    Admin -->|monitors| UC2
    Admin -->|manages| UC3
    Admin -->|coordinates| UC4
    Admin -->|executes| UC5
    Admin -->|initiates| UC6
    Admin -->|performs| UC7
    Admin -->|manages| UC8
    Admin -->|publishes| UC9
    Admin -->|manages| UC10
    
    %% Styling
    classDef actor fill:#EAB308,color:white,stroke:#EAB308,stroke-width:2px;
    classDef usecase fill:#FFFFFF,color:#333,stroke:#3B82F6,stroke-width:2px;
    classDef system fill:#F1F5F9,stroke:#64748B,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5;
    
    class Resident,Respondent,Admin actor;
    class UC1,UC2,UC3,UC4,UC5,UC6,UC7,UC8,UC9,UC10 usecase;
    class "Albuera EMS System" system;
```

## Mermaid Live Editor

To generate an image using the online editor:

1. Copy the Mermaid code from above
2. Paste it into https://mermaid.live
3. Click the download button to save as SVG or PNG

## Quick Image Generation

### Using Mermaid CLI
```bash
npm install -g @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli
mmdc -i usecase.mmd -o usecase.png -b white
```

### Using Python (with mermaid CLI)
```python
import subprocess
import os

# Mermaid diagram content for Albuera EMS Use Case Diagram
diagram = '''
%% Use Case Diagram for Albuera Emergency Management System
%% Generated by Albuera EMS
%% https://mermaid.live

graph TD
    %% Define actors
    Resident[Resident (Citizen)]
    Respondent[Emergency Respondent]
    Admin[System Administrator]
    
    %% Define use cases
    UC1[Report Emergency]
    UC2[Track Report Status]
    UC3[View Emergency Alerts]
    UC4[Respond to Emergency]
    UC5[Assign Tasks to Respondents]
    UC6[Send SMS Notifications]
    UC7[Verify Resident Accounts]
    UC8[Manage User Accounts]
    UC9[Post Emergency News]
    UC10[View Analytics Dashboard]
    
    %% Define system boundary
    subgraph "Albuera EMS System"
        direction TB
        UC1
        UC2
        UC3
        UC4
        UC5
        UC6
        UC7
        UC8
        UC9
        UC10
    end
    
    %% Define relationships
    Resident -->|triggers| UC1
    Resident -->|tracks| UC2
    Resident -->|views| UC3
    Resident -->|accesses| UC10
    
    Respondent -->|monitors| UC2
    Respondent -->|performs| UC4
    Respondent -->|accesses| UC10
    
    Admin -->|monitors| UC1
    Admin -->|monitors| UC2
    Admin -->|manages| UC3
    Admin -->|coordinates| UC4
    Admin -->|executes| UC5
    Admin -->|initiates| UC6
    Admin -->|performs| UC7
    Admin -->|manages| UC8
    Admin -->|publishes| UC9
    Admin -->|manages| UC10
    
    %% Styling
    classDef actor fill:#EAB308,color:white,stroke:#EAB308,stroke-width:2px;
    classDef usecase fill:#FFFFFF,color:#333,stroke:#3B82F6,stroke-width:2px;
    classDef system fill:#F1F5F9,stroke:#64748B,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5;
    
    class Resident,Respondent,Admin actor;
    class UC1,UC2,UC3,UC4,UC5,UC6,UC7,UC8,UC9,UC10 usecase;
    class "Albuera EMS System" system;
'''

# Write diagram to file
with open('usecase.mmd', 'w') as f:
    f.write(diagram)

# Generate image using mermaid-cli
subprocess.run(['mmdc', '-i', 'usecase.mmd', '-o', 'usecase.png', '-b', 'white'])
```

## HTML/CSS Image Generator

The React component at `frontend/src/components/UseCaseDiagram.jsx` generates the diagram as SVG and allows downloading as PNG.

Access it by adding the component to any page:

```jsx
import UseCaseDiagram from './components/UseCaseDiagram';

// In your component
<UseCaseDiagram />
```

## Features

- **Interactive SVG**: Click actors to highlight their use cases
- **Download Options**: SVG and PNG export
- **Responsive Design**: Works on desktop and mobile
- **Color-coded Actors**: Easy visual identification
- **Clear Boundaries**: System scope clearly defined

## Use Cases Explained

| Use Case | Actor(s) | Description |
|----------|----------|-------------|
| Report Emergency | Resident | Submit new emergency reports with location, type, description |
| Track Report Status | Resident, Respondent | Monitor progress of submitted reports |
| View Emergency Alerts | Resident, Respondent | Receive real-time emergency notifications |
| Respond to Emergency | Respondent | Accept and work on assigned emergency tasks |
| Assign Tasks | Admin | Distribute emergency tasks to respondents |
| Send Notifications | Admin | Broadcast SMS alerts to residents |
| Verify Residents | Admin | Approve/reject resident registrations |
| Manage Users | Admin | CRUD operations for all user types |
| Post News | Admin | Publish emergency updates and announcements |
| View Dashboard | All | Analytics and overview of all activities |
